name: Grupo Mateus S.A.
summary: Grupo Mateus SA operates a supermarket chain in Brazil. The company offers grocery items, electronic appliances, medicines, and services. It operates cash and carry, wholesale, furniture and electronics, hypermarket, and home appliance and grocery stores, as well as engages in e-commerce, bakery industry, and slicing and portioning activities. Grupo Mateus SA was founded in 1986 and is based in S√É¬£o Lu√É¬≠s, Brazil.
